intro:
Tinder has a strong presence in the USA. Embir is available in the USA as part of its worldwide web launch — with verified profiles, bidirectional orientation filtering, and full features free at launch.

Hinge and Bumble are strong alternatives in the USA. Embir is available in the USA as part of its worldwide web launch.

sections.title: Embir in the USA — the better alternative
sections.content: Tinder has name recognition in the USA, but Embir offers something fundamentally better: strict bidirectional orientation filtering, verified profiles, human moderation, and complete free access during launch.
highlights: the USA is a primary launch market for Embir
Free during launch — no subscription required

verdict: In the USA, Embir is the best alternative to Tinder in 2026: verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, universal LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free at launch.
ctaText: Join Embir in the USA — free at launch

faq.q: Is Embir available in the USA?
faq.a: Yes. the USA is one of Embir's primary launch markets. The founding community is active and growing.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Tinder in the USA?
faq.a: Embir offers verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free access that Tinder doesn't match.
Yes. Core features are free during the launch phase.
